message.ae2utility.no_terminal_link: AE2 Utility: the current terminal is not connected to an available ME network.
message.ae2utility.no_item_inputs: AE2 Utility: this JEI recipe has no item inputs to request.
message.ae2utility.no_wireless_terminal: No usable wireless terminal was found
message.ae2utility.wireless_terminal_una: The wireless terminal is currently unavailable or disconnected
message.ae2utility.ctrl_click_to_craft: CTRL + click to craft unavailable items
message.ae2utility.filtered: AE2 Utility: these items were filtered by the terminal view cells and were not requested: %1$s
message.ae2utility.missing: AE2 Utility: missing from the ME network: %1$s
message.ae2utility.full: AE2 Utility: skipped because the terminal and player inventory are full: %1$s
message.ae2utility.bookmark_missing_inpu: Nothing to bookmark (all inputs are craftable, empty, or already bookmarked)
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_bl: Blue highlighted items can be auto-crafted.
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_ct: Ctrl+Shift+left-click: upload the pattern and add inputs without a crafting pattern to JEI bookmarks.
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_sh: Hold Shift to map/upload pattern to Provider
